title: Spiced Potato Gratin
description: A flavorful twist on the classic gratin, infused with Indian spices and perfectly cooked potatoes.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of ghee over medium heat. Add the sliced onion and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic, garam masala, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced new potatoes, grated fluffy potatoes, and diced Argentinian potatoes.
Pour the onion-spice mixture over the potatoes and mix until they are evenly coated.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and dot the top with the remaining 1 tablespoon of ghee.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
